creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Set merge-quarterly?

Dan, can you send an email to ports-secteam@ and portmgr@ per https://www.FreeBSD.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/ports.html#ports-qa-misc-request-mfh to request an MFH using:

Tools/scripts/mfh 2015Q4 404324

Once this is MFH'd.  You can set merge-quarterly+ and close the PR.
